old_value: {"id":"fuwa-amq","title":"Isolate browser editor mode from server draft/publish path","description":"Default browser editing in fuwa should behave like /IDE: editor change -\u003e in-memory session update -\u003e debounced worker run -\u003e tenant DOM swap. Quarantine draft/publish/server persistence behind a legacy editor-server-mode boundary and remove those semantics from the default shell path.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"lucasmirandoliveira@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-07-05T18:53:56Z","created_by":"Schywi","updated_at":"2026-07-05T18:53:56Z"}

{"id":"fuwa-1xh","title":"Browser-only shell: ship compiler+sources in non-draft bundle for live reload","description":"Browser-only refactor made the shell request a non-draft bundle (dashboard.lua builds bundle_url without ?draft=1). But collect_compiler_sources and include_sources are gated behind opts.draft, so the in-VM compiler modules and raw .fuwa sources never reach the browser worker. require(runtime.stdlib.compiler.package_web) fails -\u003e live reload dead. Fix: always ship compiler+sources for the browser bundle (browser-only is now default and requires in-VM compile, like IDE).","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"lucasmirandoliveira@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-07-05T21:14:44Z","created_by":"Schywi","updated_at":"2026-07-05T21:14:44Z"}

new_value: Fixed in a87e425: default browser bundle now ships compiler + raw sources so the worker recompiles edits in-VM (IDE parity). make test green.
